title: chamaecrista maritima
intro: Chamaecrista maritima, also known as coastal sensitive plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the bean family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chamaecrista maritima include reducing inflammation, protecting against cell damage, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Chamaecrista maritima can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
